backend/main.mo: Motoko backend actor defining user profiles, strategies, licenses, trades, and access-controlled APIs for profile and trade management.
feature_evidence.json: Report listing feature requirements and associated frontend files for Ed25519 keypair generation and Connect Bot Wizard updates.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing prewritten summaries of various frontend components, hooks, utilities, and styles.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS configuration defining color tokens, themes, and base styles for light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entrypoint that loads the React application via main.tsx.
frontend/index.ts: Type definitions for SignalFetchResult used to represent success or error responses.
frontend/PHASE1_BACKEND_IMPLEMENTATION_C: Detailed checklist document outlining step-by-step tasks for implementing Phase 1 backend features and types.
frontend/ROADMAP_BATCH_EXECUTION.md: Execution plan describing roadmap phases, constraints, and batch tasks for frontend and backend development.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Handles authentication flow, loading states, and shows landing or profile-setup screens before rendering the main app shell within a toast provider.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Provides a sign-in/sign-out button using Internet Identity with status handling and query cache clearing.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Displays a modal for new users to submit basic profile info and saves it via a mutation.
frontend/src/components/common/AccessDen: Renders an access denied alert for unauthorized users.
frontend/src/components/common/ToastProv: Implements a toast system with context, timed dismissal, and styled notifications.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/AuditL: Fetches and displays recent audit log entries with loading, error, and empty states.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Dashbo: Shows the dashboard header with navigation, current user name, and login/logout button.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Equity: Loads and visualizes equity curve data using a composed chart with gradients and tooltips.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/LiveLo: Maintains a live terminal-style log view and supports a connectivity test that appends status entries.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/LivePu: Displays a live logging terminal that polls bot uplink status and runs a connectivity test with visual log output.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Perfor: Renders an equity curve chart using fetched performance data with loading and error states.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/System: Shows bot heartbeat status, license validity, cycles info, and last heartbeat with visual indicators.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Uplink: Provides a visual uplink status indicator and toggle switch to enable or disable bot uplink.
Manages high‑level app navigation between dashboard, settings, and payment screens with header and footer layout.
frontend/src/components/settings/Connect: Displays bot connection status and opens a wizard to configure bot public key and URL.
Guides users through generating an Ed25519 keypair, linking the public key, and setting a bot URL.
frontend/src/components/settings/Profile: Empty placeholder file with no implementation.
frontend/src/components/settings/StripeC: Modal form for entering a Stripe secret key and allowed countries, then saving the configuration via a mutation with validation and toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/settings/Subscri: Displays subscription tiers, handles Stripe checkout creation, and shows a Stripe config prompt for admins when unconfigured.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches a backend actor tied to the current identity and refreshes dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdmin.ts: Provides admin-related queries and mutations for checking admin status and managing user licenses.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuditLedger.ts: Fetches audit log entries from the backend with periodic refresh.
frontend/src/hooks/useCurrentUserProfile: Retrieves and updates the caller's user profile with cache invalidation on save.
frontend/src/hooks/useEquityCurve.ts: Builds an equity curve from the user's recent trades by calculating running PnL.
frontend/src/hooks/useFetchSignalsTest.t: Runs a backend signal fetch test and displays toast messages based on success or error.
frontend/src/hooks/useHeartbeat.ts: Fetches periodic heartbeat data for a given account with auto‑refresh.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an authentication context using Internet Identity, exposing identity state and login/logout handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useLicense.ts: Fetches the caller's license status from the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useLinkBotPublicKey.t: Registers a bot public key and refreshes related queries with toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useLiveLogs.ts: Fetches live trade logs for the current user with periodic polling.
frontend/src/hooks/useProfileSettings.ts: Empty placeholder file with no implemented logic.
frontend/src/hooks/useSetBotUrl.ts: Provides a mutation to set the bot URL with validation, error handling, and cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useStripe.ts: Contains Stripe-related queries and mutations for configuration, checkout session creation, and session status retrieval.
frontend/src/hooks/useTiers.ts: Defines queries to list subscription tiers and fetch a specific tier from the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrades.ts: Fetches paginated trade data based on account ID, time range, and limits.
frontend/src/hooks/useUplink.ts: Provides functions to fetch the bot profile and toggle uplink state with toast feedback and cache updates.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind base styles and custom theme variables for light and dark modes, including glassmorphism utility.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a utility function for merging class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point setting up React, QueryClient, Internet Identity, and global styles.
frontend/src/screens/AdminScreen.tsx: Admin interface for viewing, creating, updating, and revoking licenses with UI components and tabs.
frontend/src/screens/DashboardScreen.tsx: Dashboard layout assembling uplink controls, live terminal, telemetry, and audit panels.
frontend/src/screens/OverviewScreen.tsx: Displays user license status and account information with conditional messaging.
frontend/src/screens/PaymentFailureScree: Shows a payment cancellation message with option to return to the dashboard.
frontend/src/screens/PaymentSuccessScree: Displays a successful payment confirmation and navigation back to the dashboard.
frontend/src/screens/SettingsRouteScreen: Empty placeholder file for a settings route screen.
frontend/src/screens/SettingsScreen.tsx: Settings page with tabs for bot connection and subscription management.
frontend/src/screens/TradesScreen.tsx: React screen that fetches and paginates trades with filters for account and time, rendering a table with PnL and navigation controls.
frontend/src/utils/actorErrorMessage.ts: Normalizes actor errors into short user‑friendly messages with pattern matching for common issues.
frontend/src/utils/encoding.ts: Provides hex-to-bytes and bytes-to-hex conversion utilities.
frontend/src/utils/format.ts: Formats timestamps and computes PnL for trades based on entry/exit price and side.
frontend/src/utils/tweetnaclSmokeTest.ts: Empty placeholder file for TweetNaCl smoke testing.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL and session parameters, including hash-based routing support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending theme colors, fonts, animations, and plugins for the frontend.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing backend/feature constraints, architectural notes, known issues, and feature tracking.
